question: From three different observing views, what buttons and interfaces should this eReader have?
content:
From the front view, the eReader has a TFT LCD display, number buttons, Home/ESC, Prev/Next page controls, Zoom in/out, Rotate, Navigation/Menu, Play/Pause, Power, Volume +, Volume -, a 3.5 mm earphone jack, USB port, Micro SD card reader, reset On/Off switch, and speaker.<PIC>
The navigation-button view breaks the Navigation/Menu control into Up, Down, Left, Right, and the central M Menu/confirm button.<PIC>
The bottom view shows the power switch, MIC/mic hole, TF-card slot, earphone jack, and mini USB connector.<PIC>
ret: "From the front view, the eReader has a TFT LCD display, number buttons, Home/ESC, Prev/Next page controls, Zoom in/out, Rotate, Navigation/Menu, Play/Pause, Power, Volume +, Volume -, a 3.5 mm earphone jack, USB port, Micro SD card reader, reset On/Off switch, and speaker.<PIC>\nThe navigation-button view breaks the Navigation/Menu control into Up, Down, Left, Right, and the central M Menu/confirm button.<PIC>\nThe bottom view shows the power switch, MIC/mic hole, TF-card slot, earphone jack, and mini USB connector.<PIC>",["Manual13_0", "Manual13_1", "Manual13_2"]
notes: Answered from the Device Description front, navigation-button, and bottom views; the three selected images correspond one-to-one with the three <PIC> placeholders.
